'''chafate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:idiomorphically|idiomorphically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-f-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:idiomorphically|idiomorphically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chafate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:chafate|chafate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chafatesher|chafatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafatesherĂ«m|chafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafatero|chafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chafateshĂ«|chafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafateshĂ«m|chafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafatero|gokichafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichafateshĂ«|gokichafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafateshĂ«m|gokichafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochafankerom|gochafankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochafankeshĂ«|gochafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafankeshĂ«m|gochafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochafankeya|gochafankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafaterom|chafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafatemu|chafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chafateya|chafateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafaterom|gokichafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafatemu|gokichafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichafateya|gokichafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:chafafate|chafafate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chafafatesher|chafafatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafafatesherĂ«m|chafafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafafatero|chafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chafafateshĂ«|chafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafafateshĂ«m|chafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafafatero|gokichafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichafafateshĂ«|gokichafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafafateshĂ«m|gokichafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochafafankerom|gochafafankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochafafankeshĂ«|gochafafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafafankeshĂ«m|gochafafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochafafankeya|gochafafankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafafaterom|chafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafafatemu|chafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chafafateya|chafafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafafaterom|gokichafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafafatemu|gokichafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichafafateya|gokichafafateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:chĂŠfĂŠte|chĂŠfĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chĂŠfĂŠtesher|chĂŠfĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m|chĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠfĂŠtero|chĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|chĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|chĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠfĂŠtero|gokichĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|gokichĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|gokichĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochĂŠfĂŠnkerom|gochĂŠfĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«|gochĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gochĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochĂŠfĂŠnkeya|gochĂŠfĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠfĂŠterom|chĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠfĂŠtemu|chĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chĂŠfĂŠteya|chĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠfĂŠterom|gokichĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠfĂŠtemu|gokichĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichĂŠfĂŠteya|gokichĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:chafafte|chafafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chafaftesher|chafaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafaftesherĂ«m|chafaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafaftero|chafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chafafteshĂ«|chafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafafteshĂ«m|chafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafaftero|gokichafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichafafteshĂ«|gokichafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafafteshĂ«m|gokichafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochafafnkerom|gochafafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochafafnkeshĂ«|gochafafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafafnkeshĂ«m|gochafafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochafafnkeya|gochafafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafafterom|chafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafaftemu|chafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chafafteya|chafafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafafterom|gokichafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafaftemu|gokichafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichafafteya|gokichafafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
